problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Synaptic. Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
